title: Internal Error: Variable inlining should make this impossible with v5.024

features.name: logic variable initialized with all-ones literal
features.description: Code should include a logic variable explicitly initialized to the all-ones literal ('1)

features.name: initialized logic passed to submodule input port
features.description: Code should include passing an initialized logic variable to a submodule input port via dot notation

features.name: submodule input directly assigned to output
features.description: Code should include a submodule with an input port that is directly assigned to an output port
